name: Memory MCP Server
description: Memory management MCP server: manage persistent memory entries, channel-level thread summarization

config_schema.label: Database URL
config_schema.description: PostgreSQL connection URL for memory storage

config_schema.label: OMNI_DIR
config_schema.description: Data directory for wiki memory files

config_schema.label: Summarize After Days
config_schema.description: Days of inactivity before auto-summarizing threads

config_schema.label: Summary Window
config_schema.description: Number of threads in a summary generation window

config_schema.label: Channel Summary Tokens
config_schema.description: Maximum tokens for channel-level summary generation

config_schema.label: Summary Provider
config_schema.description: LLM provider to use for channel summarization

config_schema.label: Summary Model
config_schema.description: Model to use for channel summarization
